title: SetFrom
text: SetFrom Specify the email address of the sender. SetFrom ( Sender ) Parameters Parameter Type Direction Description Sender string In Email address of sender; maximum of 1024 bytes Return Values Table 1. Values returned in $status Value Description 0 Operation succeeded -18 Memory allocation error <0 An error occurred Description Explain this code variables handle mailApiHandle endvariables ; create the instance handle newinstance "UPOPMAIL", mailApiHandle <snip>log on to server </snip> mailApiHandle->SetFrom(FROM.MESSAGE.NM) variables handle mailApiHandle endvariables ; create the instance handle newinstance "UPOPMAIL", mailApiHandle <snip>complete message header and content, send mail, then log off mail server </snip> Copy Was this topic helpful?
